jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at RITES
jsonLd.description:
RITES invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Noida location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About RITES:
RITES is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RITES!
